page_metadata.biotools__summary: Random Forest based tool which is developed to carry out fast, efficient and accurate taxonomic classification of 16S rRNA sequences. It has the unique ability to classify small Hypervariable Regions of 16S rRNA.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Random Forest based tool which is developed to carry out fast, efficient and accurate taxonomic classification of 16S rRNA sequences. It has the unique ability to classify small Hypervariable Regions of 16S rRNA.
